generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering results for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DBSCANOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state and object track timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing LiDAR point cloud data using DBSCAN"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for object tracking using Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC logic computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingACCService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data storage in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and system management"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38Prototyping : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables PrototypingService
]

instance CPlusPlusNodeLifecycle : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for managing ROS2 node lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:enables NodeManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance RealTimeDataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring including reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesPerformanceReports
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTime3DVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingACCService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading adaptive cruise control logic computation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management functions including enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for transmitting sensor data to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance NodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing ROS2 node lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides NodeManagementInsight
]

instance PrototypingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for prototyping digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:provides PrototypingInsight
]

instance RealTime3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks for transparency"
]

instance TimeSeriesPerformanceReports : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series reports for performance analysis to support driver trust and system diagnostics"
]

instance ACCComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed speed and lead vehicle detection for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object tracking insights from Kalman filter processing"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data transmission status and integrity insights"
]

instance NodeManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ROS2 node lifecycle management insights"
]

instance PrototypingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prototyping progress and component validation insights"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable adaptive cruise control function"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable adaptive cruise control function"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking action"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting speed commands to motor voltage signals for vehicle actuation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Decentralized ROS2 nodes for physical twin functions"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Decentralized ROS2 nodes for digital twin functions"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking, enable/disable) from the digital twin to the physical vehicle's motor and steering actuators via ROS2, converting digital commands into motor voltage signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end network latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud), User Entity (remote UI), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; components communicate via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), used for real-time monitoring, optimization, and remote management of the adaptive cruise control system during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implemented per ISO 15622 performance class I (no road curvature capabilities); real-time constraints enforced via 100 ms latency and clock sync; simplified model for 1/10-scale vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency as per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson hardware (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage in cloud infrastructure, User Entity on remote devices."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework, ISO 15622 for adaptive cruise control functionality."
]
